title: Chapter 7: The CEO's Office
content: The top floor of the Atlas Foundation tower feels like a different planet. The noise of the London streets is replaced by a heavy, expensive silence. Alistair Thorne sits behind a desk carved from a single piece of dark oak, his silhouette framed by the sprawling city lights behind him.||He doesn't look like a criminal. He looks like a king. 'Detective,' he says, without looking up from his tablet. 'I'm a busy man. I hope you're here to apologize for the harassment of my staff at The Blackwood, and not to waste more of my time.'

choices.text: Get aggressive: 'I'm here to talk about the blood on your hands, Thorne.'
Keep it professional: 'I've been reviewing your audits. There are some discrepancies.'
